SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister
Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands

Annotation Interface SlashCommand

@Retention(RUNTIME) @Target(METHOD) public @interface SlashCommand
Marks a method to be registered as a global Discord Slash Command.

Methods annotated with @SlashCommand must fulfill the following criteria:

  • The method must return void.
  • The method must have exactly one parameter of type SlashCommandInteractionEvent.
  • The declaring class must provide a public no-args constructor for instantiation.

See Also:
  • Option

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    String
    command
    The primary name of the command (e.g., "ping").
    String
    description
    A brief description explaining what the command does.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    Option[]
    options
    An optional array of command arguments/options.

  • Element Details

    • command

      String command
      The primary name of the command (e.g., "ping").

      Must be lowercase and follow Discord's naming requirements (no spaces, special characters).

      Returns:
      The command name.

    • description

      String description
      A brief description explaining what the command does.

      This will be displayed in the Discord command menu.

      Returns:
      The command description.

    • options

      Option[] options
      An optional array of command arguments/options.

      Use the Option annotation to define specific parameters for this command.

      Returns:
      An array of command options, defaults to an empty array.
      Default:
      {}
